刘铭携带“竞技之王”系统穿越而来。
开局就是湖人VS勇士的第四节比赛。
本是垃圾时间，垃圾球员！
但，凭借系统之威，刘铭硬是带领湖人上演惊天大翻盘。
打出神仙局！
比赛结束后，就在所有人都以为他会顺势留在NBA打职业时。
刘铭却拒绝了湖人开出的高达500万美金保障合同，毅然决然重回田径场。
只因东京奥运会，近在眼前。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-images/c128ee7a6b50484672d8ae2b501c51bd~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"击楫涛江","author_id":"","book_id":"7008753779965168670","book_name":"竞技之王：从NBA开始重返赛场","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1608人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":15,"name":"体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=15&name=体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7008778478455620133","read_count":"1608","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"479717"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"212","tags":"游戏体育,体育,系统,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/c128ee7a6b50484672d8ae2b501c51bd~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779363020&x-signature=jZ4PluAFmR5IEyZcDX8E3mge2d0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.902925e+06"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":1,"reply_show_row":3,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读32分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":25,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1902,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":44019},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7251791677983130401","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书以金手指的方式打开一副绚丽夺目 刘铭携带“竞技之王”系统穿越而来。
开局就是湖人VS勇士的第四节比赛。
本是垃圾时间，垃圾球员！
但，凭借系统之威，刘铭硬是带领湖人上演惊天大翻盘。
打出神仙局！
